patient_profile.preceding_event: viral cold 1 week before symptom onset
patient_profile.family_autoimmune_history: mother diagnosed with rheumatoid arthritis, no other known autoimmune family history

additional_reported_symptoms: eyelid drooping worsening at end of day
physical_exam.symptom_pattern: symptoms worsen with physical activity, improve with rest, mildest first thing in the morning before activity

patient_profile.regular_medications: Occasional over-the-counter multivitamin, used for years with no adverse effects
patient_profile.pre_symptom_medication_use: Previously tolerated cold medicine for upper respiratory infection
patient_profile.prior_medical_care_for_current_symptoms: None, first consultation for these symptoms

double_vision.onset: 3 weeks prior to consultation, immediately after upper respiratory infection
